scripts.app:build: npm run helper && APPIMAGE_EXTRACT_AND_RUN=1 NO_STRIP=1 LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$PWD/src-tauri/binaries:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH" tauri build
scripts.helper: cd src-tauri && cargo build --release -p balota-workshop && mkdir -p binaries && cp target/release/balota-workshop binaries/balota-workshop-$(rustc -vV | sed -n 's/^host: //p') && cp "$(find $HOME/.cargo/registry/src -path '*steamworks-sys*/redistributable_bin/linux64/libsteam_api.so' | head -1)" binaries/
